# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent linkerd no mtls.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls


apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: SecurityPolicy
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: myapp
  egress:
  - port: 80
    protocol: HTTP
  - port: 443
    protocol: HTTPS
  transport:
  - TLS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: SecurityPolicy
metadata:
  name: mtls
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: myapp
  egress:
  - port: 80
    protocol: HTTP
  - port: 443
    protocol: HTTPS
  transport:
  - TLS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: linkerd-external
spec:
  hosts:
  - 'linkerd.istio-system.svc.cluster.local'
  ports:
  - number: 8080
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: linkerd-external-mtls
spec:
  hosts:
  - 'linkerd.istio-system.svc.cluster.local'
  ports:
  - number: 8080
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: linkerd-destination-rule
spec:
  host: linkerd.istio-system.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: myapp-service-entry
spec:
  hosts:
  - 'myapp.default.svc.cluster.local'
  ports:
  - number: 80
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: myapp-service-entry-mtls
spec:
  hosts:
  - 'myapp.default.svc.cluster.local'
  ports:
  - number: 80
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: myapp-destination-rule
spec:
  host: myapp.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: linkerd-injector-service-entry
spec:
  hosts:
  - 'linkerd-injector.default.svc.cluster.local'
  ports:
  - number: 8080
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: linkerd-injector-service-entry-mtls
spec:
  hosts:
  - 'linkerd-injector.default.svc.cluster.local'
  ports:
  - number: 8080
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: linkerd-injector-destination-rule
spec:
  host: linkerd-injector.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: myapp-service-entry-mtls-disable
spec:
  hosts:
  - 'myapp.default.svc.cluster.local'
  ports:
  - number: 80
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: myapp-service-entry-disable-mtls
spec:
  hosts:
  - 'myapp.default.svc.cluster.local'
  ports:
  - number: 80
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: myapp-destination-rule-disable-mtls
spec:
  host: myapp.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: DISABLE

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: linkerd-injector-service-entry-disable-mtls

  hosts:
  - 'linkerd-injector.default.svc.cluster.local'

  - number: 8080

    protocol: HTTP
